caption: A news broadcast from "PLUS POLITICS" features a male news anchor in a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie. He is seated in a studio with a blue, circular graphic background containing the words "PLUS POLITICS." To his right, a smaller screen shows a man wearing a red cap, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS" under the heading "ON THE PHONE." A banner at the bottom of the screen displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Social media icons and the website "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" are visible in the lower footer. Throughout the sequence, the anchor speaks and gestures with his hands, while the image of the political analyst remains static. The scene remains consistent in composition and text across the frames, capturing the anchor in a continuous delivery of his segment.
